providerNeutralAdapterUnitV1.scope: Mocked LocateAnything HTTP parsing plus manual, disabled, replay, health, normalization, identity, status, license, and confidence invariants; no live-provider accuracy claim.

contractReplayV1.scope: Schema and semantic replay matrix for all six LocateResult statuses; no geometry-accuracy claim.

productionHumanGrounding.scope: Consent-cleared held-out body and face localization, adapter reliability, and caption-safety performance remain unproven.

allow: request, run, trace, asset, region, evidence, adapter, and artifact IDs
bounded text query and diagnostic codes
deny: raw media, thumbnails, or extracted frames
media locators, URLs, local paths, object URLs, or filenames
visual-prompt assets or provider-native multimodal prompts

rules: request ID, trace ID, and asset ID must match
observation IDs must be unique within the result
observation geometry kind must equal the requested output kind
single-cardinality valid results must contain exactly one observation
all coordinates and confidence values must be finite
all normalized coordinates must be in the inclusive range zero through one
box width and height must be positive
x plus width and y plus height must not exceed one
geometry must reference the decoded rotation-corrected frame and declared mirror state
valid, ambiguous, and manual require at least one observation
malformed, empty, and failed require zero observations
malformed and failed require a typed diagnostic
manual observations cannot claim provider-reported confidence
control-plane payloads contain asset and trace identities rather than media locators
raw provider payload retention must be false
the request contains text query only and no visual-prompt asset or vendor-native payload may be emitted
automated provider health must declare textPrompt true, all health must declare visualPrompt false, and code/model license references plus acceptance are required

implementation.scope: Report adapter contract readiness, textPrompt true, visualPrompt false, and code/model license references without vendor payloads.
Invoke a configured deterministic, local-model, remote-model, or manual adapter through the same text-query-only LocateRequest contract.
Resolve an ambiguous, malformed, empty, or failed result with explicit reviewed normalized geometry.
Enforce identity, target vocabulary, finite normalized geometry, status cardinality, provenance, and trace redaction invariants.
